statement.informal: EAL ↔ EXL conjugacy via exp. If f(x) = exp(x) + ln(x) is the EAL self-map and g(y) = exp(y)·ln(y) is the EXL self-map, then on the positive reals g(exp(x)) = exp(f(x)). Encodes the identity exp(exp(x)+ln(x)) = exp(exp(x))·x = exp(exp(x))·ln(exp(x)). (over Complex instead of Real)
statement.formal_lean:
theorem eal_exl_conjugacy (x : ℝ) (hx : 0 < x) :
    Complex.exp (Complex.exp x) * Complex.log (Complex.exp x)
      = Complex.exp (Complex.exp x + Complex.log x)

tactics:
theorem eal_exl_conjugacy (x : ℝ) (hx : 0 < x) :
    Complex.exp (Complex.exp x) * Complex.log (Complex.exp x)
      = Complex.exp (Complex.exp x + Complex.log x) := by
  rw [Complex.exp_add, Complex.log_exp, Complex.exp_log hx]

metadata.verification_pending: Phase 1.5 — port legacy theorems to MachLib foundations before kernel re-verification.
